textByHashes.76a6dc134b297c42dfbf5e460c167bb2230a5d62: Destroy this low life desert rat guards!
textByHashes.c522d66ed5de34f0c56f88786337fef3045e9bdf: Be off effendi, you are not wanted around here.
textByHashes.56767e6c89e124bd8f184c894c5c952b73662aea: Oh yes! How might you do that? You seem little more than a gutter dweller. How could you teach me manners?
textByHashes.06d1e890f1a6b5ba745046863cf0ff161d44da99: Oh yes, ready your weapon then! I'm sure you won't mind if my men join in? Har, har, har! Guards kill this gutter dwelling slime.
textByHashes.880ca06e1ae9b2d985e97da32b4833822555eee7: Well, Effendi, you do need to be careful of what you say to people. Or they may take it the wrong way. Thankfully, I'm very understanding. I'll just let my guards deal with you.
textByHashes.b7081b49e1ac413200d5ed328247e3839c5b9a92: Guards, teach this desert weed some manners.
textByHashes.5ae91c165d001beedee115ce591ee0f33cd7d8f9: Hmmm, oh yes, what can you do?
textByHashes.076e374cdd106d68e03cb580a969e7554f74ab73: Ha, ha, ha! You come to a mining camp and offer us your mining skills! Thanks effendi, but we have all the miners we'll ever need.
textByHashes.c60bafbbbf99c06f95af6ecd70c7d2aaf58dd4dd: Now be off with you, before we reduce you to a bloody mess on the sand.
textByHashes.cfb1a2943e2218c78808b587975b35de87eaa58d: You could bring me the head of Al Zaba Bhasim.
textByHashes.edd554d38e85fd66bb2b2dbeedce846429ed2de5: He is the leader of the notorius desert bandits, they plague us daily. You should find them west of here. You should have no problem in finishing them all of. Do this for me and maybe I will consider helping you.
textByHashes.53b301f1d338df7507ef5afd44da06dd937510e9: Good... run along then. You stand around flapping your tongue chatting like an insane camel.
textByHashes.b454b04c6ea6e8aca5b6a85d2c3cb017a6c6a11d: Hmm, well yes. I did consider you might not be right for the job. Be off with you then before I turn my men loose on you.
textByHashes.b41152249ac665247344f9e53996c5c5f4113db0: Very well, if you're challenging me, let's get on with it!
textByHashes.d3ffc4b4397c67d8b10dbab0a48789f71ec566d6: Effendi, I think you'll find that is the wisest decision you have made today.
textByHashes.3f1394963b2a8305960e028c976f54ee8423cb45: How dare you talk to me like that! Explain your business quickly... or my guards will slay you where you stand.
textByHashes.8d257d8dd9ee3ff5ef8f7245a4426e585fe23b1a: We are not a charity effendi. Be off with you before I have your head removed from your body.
textByHashes.cf07ecd09aeb16dc34ff0ba2da895ace828cfe93: Well, perhaps I can try a little harder. Guards, kill this infidel.
textByHashes.3ecc02a503e1f0dff79204338d3804c6eb3fd1d0: For just one second, imagine that it's none of your business!
textByHashes.f0ad4d38d8741b565723be40a41451662c82f591: Also imagine having your limbs pulled from your body one at a time.
textByHashes.f181c39a9437139c5d94dcbd263704200292b9f4: Now, what was the question again?
textByHashes.6e361ce2a3c0a9cc92ec4ab8f6be11497e18d98a: Why... you ignorant, rude and eternally damned infidel, Guards, kill this infidel!
textByHashes.ee4f0202caef9298a7bcb2c08642560ae7ee7f6e: I will not tolerate such insults.. Guards, kill him.
textByHashes.01243bdc2cfafa351b047a71432308f1c0666cc7: I will not tolerate such insults.. Guards, kill her.
textByHashes.c84a996c601e8c91e4f18f3947a03950bbd6b430: Oh yes and what might that be?
textByHashes.12e9a3a6201d562209075965202dba41ef96eaef: Why, I've never been so insulted in all my days. Prepare to defend yourself wretch, I'll run you through myself!
textByHashes.a67c9a01887a322ba4630380f405d45a4592cff5: Move along now... we've had enough of your sort!
